hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite nonexistent or fabricated papers (e.g., LoCo-RLHF by Lee et al. 2024 with arXiv:2412.19436, Contextual Online Uncertainty-Aware Preference Learning by Lu et al. 2025, Contextual Bandits with Entropy-Based Human Feedback by Seraj et al. 2025, Push and Pull framework 2024, PAAC framework 2024). These cannot be verified as real publications and appear invented to support the narrative.
hallucinations.evidence: References section lists: 'Lee, S. J., Sun, W. W., & Liu, Y. (2024). Low-rank contextual reinforcement learning... arXiv:2412.19436.', 'Lu, N., Fang, E. X., & Lu, J. (2025). ... arXiv:2504.19342.', 'Seraj, R., Meng, L., & Sylvain, T. (2025). ... arXiv:2502.08759.', and similar entries for 'Push and Pull: A Framework...' and 'Popularity-Aware Alignment...'.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations were found, primarily in the form of nonexistent citations. The methodology, math, and experimental results appear consistent with the provided code and generated plots (no faked results or methodology mismatches detected).
